label: Tank option
description: A weighted gestation tank state option in a RoomPart_GestationTankDef. The element name is the State enum value; text is the weight.

state.label: State
state.description: Gestation tank state this option applies to. Populated from the XML element name.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative selection weight for this tank state. Defaults to 1.
